placements.overview:
Ramesh Chand Institute of Management is a private institute. It is located in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Ramesh Chand Institute of Management provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 5 courses across different specialisations. Some of the courses offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM, BCA, B.Com, B.A. and BBA. Ramesh Chand Institute of Management fees ranges between INR 2,00,000 to 3,25,000. The student intake for these courses is 500. Ramesh Chand Institute of Management offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Humanities & Social Sciences. Ramesh Chand Institute of Management offers all the campus facilities to students.

Ramesh Chand Institute of Management offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as BCA, B.Com and B.A. Whereas, at PG level, Ramesh Chand Institute of Management offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Ramesh Chand Institute of Management fee structure for all the courses is around INR 2,00,000 to 3,25,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A pretty average college life.

review_content.Placements: Placements in this college are nothing to boast about, as they are really basic and average. Students are better off looking for abroad studies or jobs by themselves so that they can have better opportunities than relying on the college. Hence, it's average.
review_content.Infrastructure: Really outdated infrastructure, and the quality of food is not that great. There is no variety of foods to choose from. The canteen prices are really questionable. Toilets could be expanded to let more students use them at once. The labs are good but the systems are outdated.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college to choose, if you choose academics above all.

review_content.Placements: I'm currently in the 5th semester, and placement opportunities have just started to come up. Innovate Labs and TCS are some companies that have shown up with opportunities now. Last year, about 10 students were placed in my stream. You should expect average salary packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, tilted and furnished classrooms with good ambience and controller temperature. Labs are mostly air-conditioned with good-quality equipment and comfortable seating. A new building is just coming up and looks promising for the future. Overall, it is good.

review_summary.college_name: Naipunnya Institute of Management and Information Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hotel Management and Culinary Arts - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Excellent faculty members, strong placements and great practical exposure in hospitality training.

content.Placements: For B.Sc. HMCA, around 80 percent of students get placed. Top recruiters are Taj ITC Marriott and Oberoi. The highest package offered is 5 LPA, the average package offered is 3 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 2 LPA with roles in culinary F&B and hotel operations. Top roles in IT and management.
content.Infrastructure: College offers modern classrooms, Wi-Fi, a digital library and fully equipped hotel management and culinary labs. The hostel is clean and safe, the canteen food is hygienic, and medical care is available on campus. There are also good sports and recreation facilities outdoors and indoors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is an absolutely excellent college.

content.Placements: The B.Sc. in Computer Science course of 2023 witnessed a successful placement season, reflecting the increased demand for skilled professionals. The highest package offered is extended by a leading product-based company. 78% of students got placed with an average package of 2.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of the college consists of a big library with a wide collection of books, air-conditioned labs, interactive classrooms, etc. There is a big auditorium where numerous events are organised. It has 2 big seminar halls for seminars and a college canteen.

Toilets could be expanded to let more students use them at once. The labs are good but the systems are outdated.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, tilted and furnished classrooms with good ambience and controller temperature. hostel.description: The Institute has 2 hostels facility with capacity of 100 students

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty members, strong placements and great practical exposure in hospitality training.
reviews.review_text: College offers modern classrooms, Wi-Fi, a digital library and fully equipped hotel management and culinary labs. The hostel is clean and safe, the canteen food is hygienic, and medical care is available on campus. There are also good sports and recreation facilities outdoors and indoors.

reviews.review_heading: It is an absolutely excellent college.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college consists of a big library with a wide collection of books, air-conditioned labs, interactive classrooms, etc. There is a big auditorium where numerous events are organised. It has 2 big seminar halls for seminars and a college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: A pretty average college life.
reviews.review_text: Really outdated infrastructure, and the quality of food is not that great. There is no variety of foods to choose from. The canteen prices are really questionable. Toilets could be expanded to let more students use them at once. The labs are good but the systems are outdated.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to choose, if you choose academics above all.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, tilted and furnished classrooms with good ambience and controller temperature. Labs are mostly air-conditioned with good-quality equipment and comfortable seating. A new building is just coming up and looks promising for the future. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Strict college but can enjoy college life.
reviews.review_text: Naipunniya is nature frndly college we have greatly maintained garden. We have high-speed Wi-Fi in every building and have a computer lap in 3 building, labs and library are AC and well maintained, computers in lab are minimum spec. Hostels are good they have enough beds and essential.

reviews.review_heading: The institute provides many facilities and has a great ambiance throughout.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and the library are good. The faculty members were good with their skills to teach, and communication between students was excellent. They also provided seminars and extracurricular activities and provided a good atmosphere for relaxation and mind-freeing activities. They have sports and games to participate.

reviews.review_heading: This college mainly focuses on academics.
reviews.review_text: The college provides various facilities for students. Free Wi-Fi is accessible to students. A well-organised library is also provided. It has well-developed electronics and computer labs. The campus is always clean and hygienic. Separate hostels are provided for boys and girls in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and the environment is green and superb.
reviews.review_text: The campus is great. The library is small but has more books related to academics than fiction or other interesting books. The food quality of the hostel is really good, and no complaints have been heard from anyone staying in the hostel. The medical facilities are great. The canteen is not much good but provides enough food like basic snacks and a few drinks. The college labs are good, and the classrooms are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: The college Ambience is good .
reviews.review_text: The College have a well managed canteen. The students can use the college Wi-Fi, free of cost. There are two large libraries in the campus where we can take books for referrals. The Computer lab is properly maintained and the classrooms are too neat.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges for students' career.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was big air-conditioners that were not available in labs. High-speed Wi-Fi was available for all the students. The campus was neat and clean. The food served was hygienic. The infrastructure was good. Classrooms and labs were very clean. The Wi-Fi connection was good and was very helpful to connect to the network. They provided all the necessary equipment for students' success.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Naipunnya Institute of Management and Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, and facilities like a digital library, smart classrooms, and laboratories were available. Hostel and canteen facilities were also good. The sports center was excellent. Many sports were available for the students to take part in it.

reviews.review_heading: The best for learning but the so called college life is minimal. It feels more like a school.
reviews.review_text: The campus as a whole is great the library though small has more books related to academics than fiction or other interesting stuffs. The food quality of the hostel is really good no complaints have been heard from anyone staying in the hostel. The medical facility is also great. The canteen is not much but provides enough like basic snacks and a few drinks. College lab is good and the classrooms are excellent .

college_info.college_name: Jharkhand University of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Jharkhand University of Technology is an university located in Ranchi, Jharkhand. Jharkhand University of Technology courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Jharkhand University of Technology offers a total of 32 courses in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Hospitality & Travel. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and BCA and the total seat intake for the available courses is 90. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Control Systems and Cyber Security. Further, the fee for all these courses is INR 27,420. Apart from this, the Jharkhand University of Technology campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The decent life in Dumka (DeC).

review_content.Placements: Regarding placement in my college, an average number of students are getting placed. Talking about the highest package, it has been up to 6 to 7 LPA, and the lowest has been up to 3 LPA. Some companies like Tata TC come. I got an internship related to my branch.
review_content.Infrastructure: If we talk about infrastructure, it is fine. There are separate blocks for all branches where classes are held. Facility of smart classes and labs is available. There is a library where you can go to read in a saintly atmosphere. I haven't personally stayed in the hostel, but some of my friends tell me that the hostel is fine and the quality of food is also decent.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: A good state government college for core branches like mechanical and mental mining.

review_content.Placements: My branch of electrical is having a decent placement as per 2025 report, with a median of around 6.5 LPA. Placement percentage is around 75 percent. Around 90 percent placement for its core branch like mechanical, mental mining, and for tech branch mass recruiters are major hiring MNCs.
review_content.Infrastructure: For the first year, hostels are good. It has 2 sharing but from second year onwards, it would be 4 sharing. Infrastructure is decent but it needs to be upgraded. There are two libraries, one is central library and other is GRS library present on the campus.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field. faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.question: How to apply for PSU jobs after possessing M.Tech Metallurgical Engineering degree?
faqs.answer: To secure a job in top PSUs such as GAIL, NTPC, ONGC, CIL, Hindalco etc. candidates can either apply in the direct recruitment such as Recruitment for Management Trainee or apply from their portal. Another method of recruitment is to qualify GATE which is considered as a screening criteria for recruitment in various job positions. Candidates must aim at maximizing their scores in GATE in order to secure a job in PSUs.Know more about -Metallurgical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: How to become Assistant Engineer (AE) after pursuing BTech in Metallurgical Engineering?
faqs.answer: Candidates who want to become AE in the Metallurgical Department of various states will be required to clear the required exam with a decent score and then participate in various processes. They must ensure that they possess a genuine BTech degree inMetallurgical Engineeringand must gain relevant experience through internships or training assignments. They must appear for GATE examination and apply for Assistant Engineer positions by clearing the entrance examination for recruitment.

Keshav Memorial Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.

reviews.review_heading: A good and supportive college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good in my campus, like well-equipped labs, library, and classrooms, but there are some internet issues being faced on campus. There is no hostel in my college, but there is a canteen. In that canteen, there is some good and hygienic food that is sold by them.

reviews.review_heading: Good and supportive college.
reviews.review_text: There is some nice infrastructure in my college, like a library, labs, and classrooms, but there are some internet issues being faced on campus. There is a canteen in my college, where some good and hygienic food is sold. There are some indoor games and outdoor games also present.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good with faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has decent infrastructure for the CSE department with good computer labs, proper, clean classrooms and well-maintained. There is no hostel facility on campus, but there is a canteen, and the food is okay, and basic medical and sports facilities are available. The labs have the required software for programming and project work.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and support
reviews.review_text: There is somewhat good infrastructure in my college, and it also has some good equipment in labs, and the auditorium is also nice. For my branch also, there is good infrastructure. There are some good facilities in college, and the food quality is also good, not that bad, and sports are also being conducted.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: I just like the course provided. And the food in the canteen is good. Wi-Fi is often available throughout the hostel premises. A medical room is available for emergencies. Water coolers with purifiers. Seminar halls, auditoriums, and cultural spaces for events and activities.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is graduates from OU, the infrastructure is average, and there is a high focus on academics.
reviews.review_text: In my course, about 34% of students get placed through their respective course interviews. The highest package in my college is around 40 LPA, the lowest is around 8 LPA, and the average package offered in my course, i.e., CSE, is around 20 LPA. Top companies include Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Apple, and TCS.

reviews.review_heading: Small campus, fewer events, very strict and boring.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classrooms and labs is good. Sports facilities include a small football ground, cricket net, volleyball, and other indoor games like table tennis, chess, carrom, etc. The college doesn't provide any hostel facility. Canteen food is average. There are frankie, chat, ice cream, stalls, etc.

reviews.review_heading: KMEC offers a good vibe.
reviews.review_text: KMEC Uppal offers good infrastructure with reliable Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, clean classrooms, and a helpful library. Facilities support academics, projects, and coding practice. The campus is maintained well and provides areas for sports games. It offers strong programs in CSE, AI & ML, and IT, with good infrastructure, labs, and academic support for students.

reviews.review_heading: Fresh campus, helpful teachers, and decent support.
reviews.review_text: Our course facilities are good, with reliable Wi-Fi, fresh labs, clean classrooms, and a nice library. Since the college was newly built. We don't have a hostel, but the campus has decent food options, basic medical support, and developing sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Very good placements and study, but dissatisfied with infrastructure, facilities, and fests.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average when compared to other colleges. There are no separate blocks for different courses and no separate labs for every subject. They combine 2–3 subjects and give one lab, but they are neat enough. Hostel is not available in my college. Canteen is good enough. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are average, but there are no separate grounds and less time and priority for sports. But they celebrate annual sports every year and sports fests two times a year.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest students join this college if they like to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too good. There are various kinds of labs. The library is also too big and consists of all kinds of books, which are necessary for a B.Tech student. The food available at the canteens is also reasonable, but there will not be as much variety.

reviews.review_heading: Keshav Memorial Engineering College - A place where you can learn and experiments.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is peaceful and promising with digital classrooms and smart labs, and everything that a college needs. Canteen food is top tier with every kind of food. They are also working on providing hostel facilities for the students. Overall, its a great college.

reviews.review_heading: The college was really good about the placements and the canteen was not so much as expected.
reviews.review_text: As it was the new college just established before 2 years ago so the instructurructure is very attractive and you it provides good Wi-Fi for every classrooms and lapse subjects and Central library too, the quality of the facilities in college was good but the college does not provide the hostel facilities in the food available in fanden was okay not so much well. We have the medical facilities rooms in the sports meets also provided in the college in the indoor games and order games was increase...

reviews.review_heading: With the support of our chairman Neel sir, we can improve our coding skills.
reviews.review_text: KMEC campus has labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a central library. The college provides basic medical care and facilities for indoor and outdoor games. There is no hostel in our college. We should live in a hostel nearly 3km away from the college.

reviews.review_heading: They should do better for the sake of students and their future.
reviews.review_text: The hygiene is good in the college. They keep the classrooms neat and tidy. The staff are also good. The infrastructure and facilities are too small for the name of an engineering college. Classrooms are not good yet and not so bad. College does not have its own hostel, so students should stay in outside hostels. The quality of food is average. Sports and games facilities are very poor.

reviews_list.review_title: Comprehensive campus experience with good placements and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements at Hindustan College of Arts and Science are satisfactory, with good opportunities for top performers. Many reputed companies visit the campus, offering decent packages. Pre-placement training helps students improve soft skills and interview readiness.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers spacious classrooms, advanced labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are clean, with 24/7 water, Wi-Fi, and security. The mess serves hygienic food, and recreational areas create a comfortable living and learning environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Aug 2025) M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology Course.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 84% of students are placed in specialized services. Many students found jobs in other companies. The highest salary offered was 30 LPA, and the minimum offered was 7 LPA. Big companies like Modern, Emcure, Zydus Cadila, etc., visit the college for recruitment. Almost 77% of the students received internships. The higher-level roles offered are Food Safety Specialist, Microbiologist, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hotels were well run; Wi-Fi was installed, and classrooms and libraries were also maintained. Overall, materials and equipment are above average. The food in the mess and restaurant was good and suited our taste. The stadium was good too, with games to play.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.

review_content.Placements: Our portfolio determines where we are placed. We receive 95% placement help from our college. Because it pertains to experience, it is beneficial rather than comforting. Top recruiters like Accenture, Deloitte, Zomato, and others visit our college. We enroll in positions such as robotics engineer and game developer, among others. The highest salary package offered is 34 LPA. Around 92% of students can find work.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hindustan College of Arts and Science is world-class and evergreen and offers a pollution-free environment. Our college provides good lab facilities with good internet and Wi-Fi facilities which enables students to enjoy their practice sessions. Our college offers clean food and has good medical facilities, as well as experienced doctors. Our college encourages students who are passionate about sports.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is terrible. The classrooms and halls are well-equipped. There are separate departments for each course. There are more than 20 conference halls hosting events and competitions, where students studying various subjects, organize competitions and other events. Several facilities have been developed for sports and other activities.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.

content.Placements: 62% and 83% of students were placed. The pay scale is 11 LPA to 25 LPA. Data analysts and software engineers are among the positions available. The lowest wage provided is 7 LPA, while the highest income is 33 LPA. We provide good placements at our college. Informatica, Cyberark, Splunk, and others are top recruiters. 70% of students find internships.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with modern audio-visual technology. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus. There are two hotels that are well maintained. Dedicated workstations are equipped with appropriate software and equipment, allowing for hands-on operation. There is also a cricket/football field as well as basketball and all sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive campus experience with good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: Placements at Hindustan College of Arts and Science are satisfactory, with good opportunities for top performers. Many reputed companies visit the campus, offering decent packages. Pre-placement training helps students improve soft skills and interview readiness.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers spacious classrooms, advanced labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are clean, with 24/7 water, Wi-Fi, and security. The mess serves hygienic food, and recreational areas create a comfortable living and learning environment.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Aug 2025) M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology Course.

content.Placements: Approximately 84% of students are placed in specialized services. Many students found jobs in other companies. The highest salary offered was 30 LPA, and the minimum offered was 7 LPA. Big companies like Modern, Emcure, Zydus Cadila, etc., visit the college for recruitment. Almost 77% of the students received internships. The higher-level roles offered are Food Safety Specialist, Microbiologist, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: The hotels were well run; Wi-Fi was installed, and classrooms and libraries were also maintained. Overall, materials and equipment are above average. The food in the mess and restaurant was good and suited our taste. The stadium was good too, with games to play.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.

content.Placements: Our portfolio determines where we are placed. We receive 95% placement help from our college. Because it pertains to experience, it is beneficial rather than comforting. Top recruiters like Accenture, Deloitte, Zomato, and others visit our college. We enroll in positions such as robotics engineer and game developer, among others. The highest salary package offered is 34 LPA. Around 92% of students can find work.
content.Infrastructure: Hindustan College of Arts and Science is world-class and evergreen and offers a pollution-free environment. Our college provides good lab facilities with good internet and Wi-Fi facilities which enables students to enjoy their practice sessions. Our college offers clean food and has good medical facilities, as well as experienced doctors. Our college encourages students who are passionate about sports.

admission_overview.college_name: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai admission 2025 is open.Affiliated to theUniversity of Madras,Hindustan College of Arts & Science (HCAS), Chennai is a part of the Hindustan Group of Institutions.HCAS admission is merit-based and registrations for online admission to HCAS are open as per its official website.The college offers 17 undergraduate, seven postgraduate, three MPhil, and two PhD programmes in varied fields such asScience, Commerce,Humanities,Management,Information Technology, etc.HCAS Chennaialso offers distance education in some of the PG programmes such as MBA, MSc, and MCA.

For UG, PG, and Research courses, candidates must have completed their Class 12, graduation, and post-graduation, respectively. It also offers some add-on courses along with some of its UG/ PG courses. HCAS Admission to most of the offered programmes is merit-based. Therefore. candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria. Find below theHCAS Chennai courseseligibility/selection criteria for admission 2025:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai fees range from INR 50,000 to INR 2 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the fee once their application form is verified and approved. The college also offers merit scholarships to its students. Find below the course-wise fees for 2025:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
For admission toHCAS courses, candidates must complete the multi-step admission procedure which is completely online. Find below the detailed steps:
Step 1: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Application

Candidates must visitHindustan College's official websiteto apply. The application process begins with a new registration, which requires candidates to sign-upon the official website of the college. After registration, candidates can access the application form.
Step 2: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Shortlisting

Eligible applications will be shortlisted for the further admission process. Shortlisting is done based on the performance in the candidate's last qualifying exam. Shortlisted candidates will receive a confirmation mail. Now candidates can make the fee payment to finalise the admission,
Step 3: Hindustan College of Arts and Science Chennai Documents Verifications
Candidates will have to visit the college office for document verification. The date and time will be mailed.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: Hindustan College of Arts and Science is world-class and evergreen and offers a pollution-free environment. Our college provides good lab facilities with good internet and Wi-Fi facilities which enables students to enjoy their practice sessions. Our college offers clean food and has good medical facilities, as well as experienced doctors. Our college encourages students who are passionate about sports.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for M.Sc. in the computer science course.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like Wi-Fi in classrooms, computer labs, and a library for the students. The college has provided laptops to all the students. The hostel is good in terms of infrastructure, and the food served is also good. A medical laboratory is located in our college, and various sports events are also held.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.Sc. in computer science courses.
reviews.review_text: This college is well-maintained and one of the best colleges in India. Campus is excellent, and the location is suitable for students. This college is well-equipped. Classrooms are well-equipped. Wi-Fi system is also good, and connectivity is provided. It also has a library. For boys, there is a separate hostel named management hostel, for girls. They go to triveni complex. It also offers a good riot, a dedicated student health center, and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for the M.Sc. in Information Technology course.
reviews.review_text: Our college has first-rate facilities. Every course at our college has its own computer. There is Wi-Fi at our college. The design of the classrooms is requisite. The hostel is excellent. The hotel's cuisine is good. Good food is served in the restaurant. Clinics are available at our college. Participation in extracurricular activities and sports is encouraged among students.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion on my college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are good, and they are very friendly with all students except one or two. Other things like the library, classroom, and others are good. The hostel is very bad. They will only take fees from us, but everything will be bad, like food and other things. They will only provide a room and food for the highest fees (₹25,000 per month) I have ever paid for a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: My course has amazing materials. Wi-Fi and air conditioning are accessible in all classrooms. There is plenty of computer space, classrooms are very large and pleasant, and libraries are available for departments. Good eating is convenient and straightforward. A reputable clinic operates around the clock. Sports and games play an important role.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. In Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The laboratories and classrooms were clean and well-equipped. The hostel provides all amenities such as a gym, Wi-Fi, and a game area, as well as all sports equipment. The quality of mess meals is average. Our college has two libraries, one for the MBA, medical department, and the other for the Information Technology branch, and both have all of the texts available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are superb. We pay special attention to facilities such as a state-of-the-art library and a clinic for students and professors. Classrooms are outfitted with ventilated displays. We have around 5 large and small canteens with average meal quality. The hostel rooms are lovely, the old ones livable, and the modern ones ideal.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was best college for the MSc in Computer Science course.
reviews.review_text: College had best infrastructure I have ever seen or experienced. College management met all of pupils fundamental needs. Other advanced features include classrooms with smart boards, electricity, and internet access. College settings and environs were maintained on a daily basis. Pleasant setting for mental wellness and concentration.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. in Applied Microbiology Course.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped infrastructure with good lab facilities and projectors in all classes, Wi-Fi connectivity, a good library, and a pleasant learning environment. The hostel facilities are excellent; the rooms are spotless, and the food is fresh and healthy. The amenities are cleaned daily, and the rooms are big and air-conditioned. Medical facilities are adequate, and staff are attentive to students' needs. Sports and activities help us stay healthy and fit.

reviews.review_heading: I can rate this college out of 5, & I can give it 4.5 because of the best teachers.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and well maintained. Good teaching hostel facilities are well maintained. Hostel food is also good. We have all facilities like washing clothes and we have a generator facility also in the hostel. Our wife is well maintaining hospitality .

placement_data.title: MEC - Mahendra Engineering College Placement overview
paragraphs: An autonomous institute, MEC was started in 1995 . The placement statistics are improving every year and this year as high as 677 students were placed through campus placement. The placement cell at MEC takes students through rigorous training to get better placements.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at MEC - Mahendra Engineering College?
faqs.answer: As per Shiksha verified reviews, MEC - Mahendra Engineering College has an impressive review rating of 3.01 by 62 students.

faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at MEC - Mahendra Engineering College to MBA/PGDM students?
faqs.answer: MEC - Mahendra Engineering College offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 4.56 LPA to MBA/PGDM students.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities for B.Tech Aerospace Engineering graduates?
faqs.answer: BTech Aerospace Engineering course opens doors for exciting career profiles in a variety of industrial fields and work with several recruiters such as airline companies, government research organizations, multinational aircraft manufacturing companies, the Indian Air Force, aeronautical laboratories, space agencies, etc. You can also enter the civil aviation industry, information technology and consulting, and automotive industries. You can work as Aerospace Engineer, Aeronautical Engineer, Aviation Engineer, Propulsion Systems Engineer, Aerodynamics Engineer, Spacecraft Maintenance Engineer, Flight Test Engineer, etc., and many more profiles. The average BTech Aerospace Engineering salary is also quite decent for recent graduates, between INR 8 LPA and INR 10 LPA . Know more about - Btech career

reviews.review_heading: The fee process is strict.
reviews.review_text: They have well developed structures labs Aero lab Aerodynamic labs and labs for PSTC Autocads PDP labs etc. We have a well infrastructure Library consisting of all sorts of books including every detail for related searches. Hostel has three to five blocks for women and boys hostel has 5 to 7blocks. They provide good labs with equipped instruments to develop our technical and practical skills.

reviews.review_heading: About our Mahendra Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Students can use free Wi-Fi on our campus, and they also have access to the library and labs when they need to. The quality of the food is decent, and the facilities in the hostel environment are really clean and good. Students interested in sports and games are encouraged to participate in inter-college competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Mahendra Engineering College is the absolute best engineering college in Namakkal.
reviews.review_text: Mahendra Engineering College's infrastructure and facilities were excellent. A greater number of classrooms and modern laboratories are available in this college. CCTV and Wi-Fi network facilities are available on this college campus. A well-stocked library is also here at this college. This college provides good hostel facilities for boys and girls. A variety of foods are available in this college canteen. Multiple sports grounds and coaching staff facilities are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Mahendra Engineering College has good placements.
reviews.review_text: Mahendra Engineering College classrooms are more spacious and air-conditioned. There are modern laboratories and updated machines and software available in this college. This college hostel is daily maintained and in good condition. Variety of foods available in this college canteen and hostel. Some sports grounds facilities are also here at this college. This college has emergency medical facilities. This college provides Wi-Fi network facilities on this college campus. Mahendra Engineering Col...

reviews.review_heading: Mahendra Engineering College is a good college. I am satisfied because of the good facilities.
reviews.review_text: I am a hostel student. The hostel facility is also good enough and it has a deluxe room where 4 can stay in it with an attached bathroom. Another one is standard where 8 students can stay with separate bathrooms and 24-hour water supply. The hostel mess is available where we can pay Rs. 3,650 per month.

reviews.review_heading: About Mahendra Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Mahendra College of Engineering is located in Salem, Tamil Nadu. It was established in 2005. This institute offers various UG and PG programs, offered in full-time mode. Faculty members at The Mahendra College of Engineering have many years of experience. This institute provides courses in various streams, including engineering, business and management studies and IT & software. Mahendra College of Engineering provides students with an opportunity to learn from skilled and experienced faculty me...

reviews.review_heading: Mahendra Engineering College is one of the best engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: Mahendra Engineering College has the best infrastructure facilities. More hi-tech laboratories are available in this college. This college library facility is excellent. Full campus CCTV camera facilities are also here at this college. This college has separate hostels for boys and girls. Hostel rooms are daily maintained in very good condition. Hostel foods taste good. This college has good sports grounds facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about my dream college where I enjoy my studies.
reviews.review_text: My department’s infrastructure is very nice accommodating as many as 170 students. The departmental labs are very user friendly. The classrooms are heavenly. Hostels are clean and neat. The food provided is very tasty and we have the biggest canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Mahendra Engineering College will provide good learning and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Mahendra Engineering College will be good. And the hostel and mess are also available in my college and the hostel is also in good condition in separate blocks in separate years. The food will not be bad in my college lab facility, and facilities will be provided for good learning .

reviews.review_heading: College excels in academics, community, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure and facilities are excellent. We have Wi-Fi facilities with good internet speed. We have multiple labs, and each lab has Wi-Fi, printers, and all other necessary facilities. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is out of the box and fully hygienic. Our college also has a library with a huge collection of books. We also have projector facilities for presentations, seminars, and workshops. Two outdoor grounds and one indoor stadium are available. Medical...

reviews.review_heading: Dynamic learning environment and comfortable campus living .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college campus and hotel is excellent. Hostel facilities are good and food is delicious and hygienic. Classrooms are air conditioned, free wi- fi is available in whole campus. Separate canteen facility is also available. Separate space available for all sports activities and medical facilities. All kind of facilities are available in labs and in library.

reviews.review_heading: Mahindra engineering college is a really good college.
reviews.review_text: This college infrastructure is good. More computer laboratories with internet facilities. And more mechanical and electrical laboratories are available for this college. This college hostel food quality is very hygienic and very healthy. Especially medical facilities are available at all times.

reviews.review_heading: Academic excellence and a vibrant campus.
reviews.review_text: The college campus features an expensive library, along with Wi-Fi facilities boasting excellent network speed. Classrooms are well-furnished and equipped with all necessary equipment. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is hygienic and delicious. Medical facilities are also available, and there is a large playground with a tennis court and all necessary sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Exploring academic excellence.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are excellent. In our college campus, Wi-Fi is available with good network speed. There are labs with all necessary tools. The library has a huge number of books. Classrooms are well-furnished. Our college also has a tennis court, a big playground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good. The hostel has strict rules. The food served in the hostel is not good. The hostel maintenance is not good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Vimal Jyoti Engineering College - VJEC offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with academics, faculty members, and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: At Vimal Jyothi Engineering College, above half of the students are getting college placements in several reputed companies at a good amount of salary. The average package offered in the college placement is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies visiting the college are Amazon, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Bharath Banz, and so on. From the sixth semester, students are free to do internships in any companies they like to do. Through this, students have a high chance of getting college placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities offered by the college are good. There are labs with a/c and all the needed facilities for students. There are also libraries such as a central library and department libraries for students. The campus has a high-speed Wi-Fi connection which runs everything smoothly. The classrooms are fully equipped with smart TVs and blackboards. The hostel mess and the canteen are so hygienic and clean. The quality of the food is so good. There are also several sports activities such as basketball, volleyball, football, kho-kho, cricket, and other individual games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure with better career opportunities.

review_content.Placements: I'm studying civil engineering, and as of now approximately 60% of students were placed. The lowest package is 1.8 LPA, and the highest is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, and Arbee Structures. About 40% of students have gotten internships so far.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi access for all departments, and we have department libraries and a central library. Classrooms are neat and clean and have good ventilation. I'm a day scholar, but I have stayed in a hostel for two days, and the quality of the food is excellent. There are sick rooms in college to take rest.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college has fantastic infrastructure.

content.Placements: Approximately 80 to 85 percent of students from this branch get jobs from top companies. This branch is very advanced and in great need for the future. The highest package for students is 18 LPA, the average is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Nearly 72 percent of students get internships.

The campus is goo...

Mess food might not be good at some times. Canteen food is excellent, and at a lower price than outside. Indoor sports are available. Two basketball courts and one football field are available.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Trident ET Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Trident ET Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 3-years Engineering Diploma or passed B.Sc and class 12th with Mathematics and obtained not less than 45% marks in aggregate (40% in for SC/ST).UG DiplomaCandidate must have appeared/ passed 10th standard examination with a minimum 35% marks.
There is not any upper age bar but candidate must attain minimum 14 years on 1st July 2020.MBA/PGDMCandidate with grace marks are not allowed for admission.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET courses stands around INR 1,22,000 to 2,59,200.

faqs.answer: A:    Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET has courses such as B.Tech, BBA, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities and value for money.

review_content.Placements: There are 60% of students who got placed. The average package is 3 LPA and the highest is 6 LPA. TCS and Ogrid are the top companies. About 90% of students got internships. The top roles offered by our college are in marketing and sales. Overall, placements are offered, but clearing and grabbing the opportunities is all on the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on every floor, and classrooms are very clean, with AC in every classroom. Labs are for computer subjects, and there are three days of lab classes. The hostel is on the 7th floor, and all facilities are provided to the students, with some rules in place to maintain discipline.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied, overall good placement and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In our college, average placement was about 60% for students. The highest packages are offered at INR 14 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, TCS, and Infosys visit our campus. About 60% of students are interns at our college. Our college offers degrees like B.Tech., BBA., BCA., etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has all the facilities and equipment, but it has no wi-fi campus. We have a well-maintained library, labs, and classrooms that are neat and clean, but in our college, the speed of the network does not work properly. The food is not good and well maintained, but we have the best ground to play sports like cricket, football, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is big, and the classes are well maintained.Faculty members are experienced and helpful.

review_summary.college_name: Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The real phase of college life.

content.Placements: As of now, what I have seen throughout my first year is that I don't see most of the seniors for campus placements. There are very few chances to spot a 4th-year student on a non-examination day. Many of my seniors told juniors to prepare ourselves for their future betterment, and there is no guarantee that college will give us placement with a high-end package. However, it's all on us.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is totally messed up. Most of the classroom requires renovation. It also needs to improve the lighting in classrooms, along with tables and benches. It has switchboards, but some of them are broken. Fan conditions in classrooms are okay, but in the canteen, they are totally dead.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good choice of yours to join this college.

content.Placements: MERI has an active placement cell that invites reputed companies for campus placements. Comapnies like Wipro, TCS, Infosys, and HDFC Bank are known to recruit from MERI. The Career Development Center conducts coding tests, mock technical interviews, and provides training in aptitude and programming skills.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities include computer labs, smart classrooms, and a digital library. College provides seminars, workshops, and practical training. A final-year project is mandatory and carries significant weight. Students are required to develop a complete software/application under faculty supervision.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities and value for money.

content.Placements: There are 60% of students who got placed. The average package is 3 LPA and the highest is 6 LPA. TCS and Ogrid are the top companies. About 90% of students got internships. The top roles offered by our college are in marketing and sales. Overall, placements are offered, but clearing and grabbing the opportunities is all on the students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on every floor, and classrooms are very clean, with AC in every classroom. Labs are for computer subjects, and there are three days of lab classes. The hostel is on the 7th floor, and all facilities are provided to the students, with some rules in place to maintain discipline.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied, overall good placement and infrastructure.

content.Placements: In our college, average placement was about 60% for students. The highest packages are offered at INR 14 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, TCS, and Infosys visit our campus. About 60% of students are interns at our college. Our college offers degrees like B.Tech., BBA., BCA., etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has all the facilities and equipment, but it has no wi-fi campus. We have a well-maintained library, labs, and classrooms that are neat and clean, but in our college, the speed of the network does not work properly. The food is not good and well maintained, but we have the best ground to play sports like cricket, football, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is big, and the classes are well maintained.Faculty members are experienced and helpful.

content.Placements: In our college, at least 60% of students were placed last year. The highest package in our college was INR 14 lacs per annum. The lowest package in our college was INR 4 lacs per annum. The average package in our college was INR 5 lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies in our college are Infosys and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: The overall condition of the college is good. All classes are properly air-conditioned, which helps a lot in the summer. The computer labs at our college have systems in good condition and a stable internet connection. Proper gym facilities are available. The canteen is clean, and the person cooking there is also experienced. We have proper grounds for football and cricket and courts for basketball and volleyball.

reviews.review_text: Our college has two campuses. The first is the branch of the main campus, which is located in Janakpuri. It consists of Wi-Fi, a library, a canteen, an auditorium, and several rooms for different activities like dance, etc. The other campus is in Haryana, which is famous for sports and lab classes.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of the management, which is not good in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available. Labs are not good. There is a shortage of electricity and computers. Our classrooms are not good. The library is good. The hostel facilities are not good. The quality of the food is not good. There are limited food options. Medical facilities are not good. Sports and games facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teachers and the college environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides average infrastructure. The library and mess are good. Our classrooms are neat and clean. Projectors are available in classrooms. The network does not work properly. The Wi-Fi speed is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Great environment around the campus with good placement offers.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the necessary facilities and equipment. The college doesn't have Wi-Fi campus. We have well maintained library, labs and classrooms. Washrooms need to be maintained. The food is not so good. There is a proper playground for outdoor sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the faculty. Good placements in CSE last year.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. The place is very big but it is not so safe. The classroom and lab facilities are good as there are very less number of students in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, not good college or campus life.
reviews.review_text: The campus has all the required facilities. There is a library, which is big enough. Wi-Fi is provided all over the campus. Labs with all the required apparatus is available. Hostel facility is not available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all types of facilities like a well-maintained library with a collection of every type of book. Classrooms are well-maintained and very hygienic. There are various types of activities like various sports such as football, cricket, basketball, table tennis, etc. The canteen is very hygienic. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good and worth the budget!
reviews.review_text: Many facilities like course analysis, a good department with well-structured labs with sufficient systems, average classrooms, and a good library! Hostel facilities are average, with average mess facilities. 0 stars for medical facilities and 5 stars for sports and games, as our college focuses high on them!

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat good but not fully recommended!
reviews.review_text:
Compared to all other courses, BCA is given special facilities of utilisation... A good lab with sufficient systems, well area etc
In the matter of food and mess i would like to rate 4 stars as it provides good food.. the area is well maintained from recent days... 0 stars for medical facilities and high priority is given for sports!
